metaDescription: Simple, transparent pricing for Sentroy — mail, storage, auth and secrets behind one SDK.
title: Simple, transparent pricing
subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your company grows. Every plan includes the full Sentroy platform.
faqBillingA: Plans are billed per company through Polar. Pay monthly or yearly and switch anytime.
faqChangeQ: Can I upgrade or downgrade later?
faqChangeA: Yes — change your plan anytime from your company billing page; we prorate the difference.
faqCancelA: You keep access until the end of your billing period, then your company moves to the Free plan.
footerTagline: Mail, storage, auth and secrets — one SDK.
